title: What makes the work commercially effective
description: A strong web presence is not built from aesthetics alone. It works when structure, discoverability, messaging and technical execution support the same business goal.

pillars.title: Commercial structure
pillars.description: Pages, hierarchy and calls to action are built around decision-making, not just content placement.

pillars.title: Technical SEO
pillars.description: Metadata, schema, speed, internal linking and clean HTML support visibility without making the product feel mechanical.

pillars.title: Scalable system
pillars.description: The site is prepared for new pages, campaigns, services and content growth instead of being trapped in a one-off layout.

pillars.title: Performance discipline
pillars.description: Fast rendering, maintainable code and predictable production quality are part of the product standard.

reasonsTitle: What this changes for a business
reasons: Cleaner user journeys and calls to action
A technical base that can support future growth
ctaQuote: SEO should sit inside the product logic, not hang on the page like a checklist.
ctaDescription: The work is strongest when design, content and implementation support the same commercial direction. That is how I approach product websites, service sites and custom web platforms.
